---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a crash or something not working correctly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Modpack Version**
e.g. v1.0.0

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug.

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Go to...
2. Click on...
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
What should have happened?

**Crash log / error**
Paste your crash report or `logs/latest.log` here (use a code block or link to https://mclo.gs).

**Additional context**
Any other info (mods added, settings changed, etc.)
